claims.answer_preview:
## Executive Summary
Meta delivered clear monetization progress in Q3 FY2025, with Family of Apps other revenue rising 59% year over year. [FILING] Reality Labs revenue also accelerated 74% in the quarter. [FILING] The filing also shows a one-time $15.93B tax charge from OBBBA enactment. [FILING]

#

Apple delivered $94.0B in total net sales in Q3 FY2025. [FILING] Gross margin expanded to $43.7B, with total gross margin at 46.5%. [FILING] The quarter also featured $21.0B of share repurchases and $3.9B of dividends and dividend equivalents. [FILING]
